creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
OK I solved the puzzle.
I performed all of this on the jail I created this pr(1)
from. However, the port tree is *now* older. On a different
different jail with a port tree updated yesterday. My results
are identical to yours. Sorry. It probably should have occurred
to me earlier. But my head was full of a bunch of other things,
and it was late. Now that my mind is clear, and I've had some
sleep...
